summary: Phase 1 feature testing: Staff Portal, GST dropdown, Fee Queries pagination/comments, Student UID auto-generation, Parent Portal download restriction. All 9 backend tests pass. All frontend flows verified working.

issues: Console warning: <span> cannot be a child of <option> (hydration error from course name rendered via span wrapper). Minor cosmetic/SSR warning, no functional impact.

action_items: Minor: Fix <span> inside <option> in Finance.js course dropdown to avoid HTML hydration warning (replace span wrapper with plain text)
critical_code_review_comments: finance.py PDF invoice still hardcodes 'GST (18%)' label in the fee breakdown table (line 133) — should use actual gst_rate from invoice. Low priority but inaccurate for non-18% invoices.
_generate_student_uid uses institute code from DB but falls back to 'STU' if not found — enrollment numbers like 'STU-STU-2026-0001' could appear for incomplete institute setups.
seed_data_creation: One test student (TEST_UID_Student) created and activated for enrollment_no test; may remain in DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 features all verified: Staff Portal (/staff-portal) shows ADM-2026-0001, ID card PDF downloads, phone edit works. Finance GST dropdown has 30 options default 18%, backend correctly calculates. Fee Queries paginated (items/total/pages), admin comment inline flow works. Parent Portal shows 'Contact Admin for PDF' instead of download buttons. Student activation generates enrollment_no (e.g. DEFAULT-STU-2026-XXXX).
rca_of_issue: Minor: finance.py PDF hardcodes 'GST (18%)' text on line 133 regardless of actual rate stored in invoice.gst_rate. Should use f'GST ({invoice.get("gst_rate", 18)}%)'
